summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent maintainer review items; unavailable refs are escalated only for missing live state caused by GitHub API rate limiting.

actions.reason: Independent open PR awaiting maintainer review; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed or justified in plan mode.
Keep as an independent draft maintainer-owned PR; draft state blocks merge and there is no duplicate closeout basis.
